{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Spyglass (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The Spyglass is an item used to help find the Gate.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
